name: gemmi-dump
description: Extract GEMMI (Google Earth) binaries and config from HDD for offline analysis — needed for auth bypass patching
author: dspl1236
notes: Extracts gemmi_final (~2MB), libembeddedearth.so (~20MB), and all config. Upload to Claude for Ghidra RE of Google hostnames and auth bypass points. Based on ruthr's approach on a5oc.com.
